lessonBodyPass: complete draft authoring pass across Chapters 01-10 plus course metadata, core templates, examples, and review docs
releaseReadiness: Validation gates pass, but OTS-101 is still a draft active rebuild. Not release-ready until humanReviewed is true and a teacher-facing review confirms the lessons are useful under real classroom pressure.
notes: Chapters 01-10 have real lesson bodies, templates, and sample packet materials. OTS-101 is active as the foundations course after the OTS-000 on-ramp. Human review still needs to confirm that OTS-101 keeps the capstone focused on a Mini Course Content Packet with evidence, verification, safety, accessibility, source quality, publishing status, and revision triggers.
